response:
VERDICT: GENUINE
ROUND: NONE
REASONING: I systematically verified each operation in the compression rounds. Specifically, I checked the smaller operations such as rotations (L0022, L0028, etc.), XORs, and ANDs (L0023, L0029, etc.) before proceeding to the larger sums and updating steps that rely on them (L0024-L0032, L0039-L0046, etc.). Every intermediate value and transformation was consistent with the SHA-256-style compression algorithm, meaning all values in all rounds were correctly computed without any discrepancies from what the algorithm dictates. Therefore, I conclude that the trace is genuine, with no single-bit tampering detected.
